  #jc-badge {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    z-index: 9999;
  }

  .floating-call-button {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #57ce7f 0%, #3fb86a 100%);
    color: white;
    border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 15px 25px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    text-decoration: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 16px;
  }

  .floating-call-button:hover {
    transform: scale(1.05);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    color: white;
  }

  .floating-call-button svg {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
  }

  .floating-call-button-text {
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0.7);
    }
    50% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 10px rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
    100% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 12px 20px;
      font-size: 14px;
      gap: 10px;
      bottom: 15px;
      right: 15px;
    }
    
    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 10px 16px;
      font-size: 13px;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    
    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
    }
  }
</style>

pages.rawText:
Oasis Recovery's Fort Myers Rehab 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

About 

 
 
Overview
 
 

 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 YOU ARE NOT ALONE 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 BREAK FREE 

 
 
 

 reclaim your life 

 
 
 

 Addiction doesn’t define you. You deserve a chance to heal, to overcome, and to build a brighter future, 

 and you don’t have to do it alone. 

 At Oasis Recovery's Fort Myer rehab, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 We Know What You’re Facing 

 
 
 

 Addiction affects every part of your life. It damages relationships, impacts your health, and steals moments you can never get back. 

 At Oasis Recovery, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Need Immediate Help?

 
 
 

Our Oasis Recovery specialists are here for you 24/7. 

Reach out to them now and start your path to recovery without delay.

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

We’re Here for You 

 
 
 

 At Oasis Recovery, we’ve helped countless people find their way out of addiction. Our team of dedicated specialists provides a safe, supportive, and judgment‑free space where you can focus on recovery and renewal. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

get started today

 
 
 

 A Simple Path to Recovery 

 
 
 

 

 Step 1: Call us or fill out a quick form.

 Step 2: Begin a personalized treatment plan tailored to your needs.

 Step 3 : Build a life of long‑term sobriety, health, and fulfillment.

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Rediscover Life and Freedom 

 
 
 

 With holistic, evidence‑based care, you can break free from addiction and create a future you’re proud of, 

 one that’s filled with purpose, connection, and joy. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

3625 Hidden Tree Ln

Fort Myers, FL 33901

Main Phone: (844) 467-4450 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

© 2026 Oasis Recovery. All rights reserved. Site designed and managed by Mosheli. 

 Privacy Policy | Terms and Conditions 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 Get Help Today

#section-RowgjRVpJ {
    background-color: transparent;

}

/* Header Section (Scrolled State) */

    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) !important;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    padding: 5px 0 !important;
}

/* Logo/Image Scaling */
#image-T5vKdWVu281 {
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
}

}

pages.rawText:
Oasis Recovery: Fort Myers Addiction Treatment Admissions 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

(844) 467-4450

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Admissions 

 
 
 

 We've streamlined our admissions process to ensure you receive prompt verification and assessment of your situation, making it simple and hassle-free. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Your Guide to Addiction Treatment in Fort Myers 

 
 
 

 If you’re searching for a clear path forward, Oasis Recovery Center in Fort Myers is here to help. This guide will walk you through everything you need to know—from how to begin the admissions process to understanding treatment options and financial assistance. We’re here to provide clarity, support, and real answers, so you can take the next step toward lasting recovery with confidence. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

How We Help You Move Forward

 
 
 

At Oasis Recovery Center, we make it easier to take that first step. Whether you need the structure of residential care or the flexibility of outpatient services, our team is here to guide you every step of the way. You’ll never have to face recovery alone—we’re available 24/7 to support you with the care, clarity, and connection you need to succeed.

 Here’s how we support your journey: 

 
 
 

 

 24/7 Recovery Specialists: Get in touch with our caring team anytime to begin your path to healing.

 Flexible Payment Options: We offer various payment plans and financial aid opportunities to ensure care is within reach.

 Family Involvement: We encourage loved ones to walk alongside you with education and support throughout treatment.

 Continued Support After Treatment: Stay connected through our alumni program and access the tools and community you need for lasting recovery.

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Need Immediate Help?

 
 
 

Our Oasis Recovery specialists are here for you 24/7. 

Reach out to them now and start your path to recovery without delay.

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Our Process: A Clear Path to Healing 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 Private Assessment 

 
 
 

We discuss the challenges you or your loved one are facing and explore how Recreate Behavioral Health Network can provide support.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 Complimentary Insurance Check 

 
 
 

We confirm your insurance coverage to ascertain any potential out-of-pocket costs.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 Admission Evaluation 

 
 
 

Through this evaluation, we identify the suitable level of care and ensure your loved one is ready for admission.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Ready to get started? 

 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Insurances we accept

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

get started today

 
 
 

 A Simple Path to Recovery 

 
 
 

 

 Step 1: Call us or fill out a quick form.

 Step 2: Begin a personalized treatment plan tailored to your needs.

 Step 3 : Build a life of long‑term sobriety, health, and fulfillment.

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 TESTIMONIALS 

 
 
 

 Healing Happens Here 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 "The staff truly cares" 

 
 
 

"From the moment I walked in, I felt supported. The team at Oasis helped me believe in myself again and gave me the tools to rebuild my life."

 - Jessica R. 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 "A safe place to heal" 

 
 
 

"I had tried other programs before, but nothing felt as personal or effective. Oasis gave me a sense of peace I hadn’t felt in years."

 - David M. 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 "Exactly what I needed" 

 
 
 

"I was broken and hopeless. This place brought light back into my life. I’m forever grateful for the love and guidance I received."

 - Rachel T. 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 BREAK FREE 

 
 
 

 reclaim your life 

 
 
 

 Addiction doesn’t define you. You deserve a chance to heal, to overcome, and to build a brighter future, 

 and you don’t have to do it alone. 

 At Oasis Recovery, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

3625 Hidden Tree Ln

Fort Myers, FL 33901

Main Phone: (844) 467-4450 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

© 2026 Oasis Recovery. All rights reserved. Site designed and managed by Mosheli. 

 Privacy Policy | Terms and Conditions 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 Get Help Today

<style>
  #jc-badge {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    z-index: 9999;
  }

  .floating-call-button {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #57ce7f 0%, #3fb86a 100%);
    color: white;
    border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 15px 25px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    text-decoration: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 16px;
  }

  .floating-call-button:hover {
    transform: scale(1.05);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    color: white;
  }

  .floating-call-button svg {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
  }

  .floating-call-button-text {
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0.7);
    }
    50% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 10px rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
    100% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 12px 20px;
      font-size: 14px;
      gap: 10px;
      bottom: 15px;
      right: 15px;
    }
    
    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 10px 16px;
      font-size: 13px;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    
    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
    }
  }
</style>

pages.rawText:
Fort Myers Addiction Treatment: Oasis Recovery Programs 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

(844) 467-4450

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Fort Myers Addiction ​Treatment Programs 

 
 
 

 At Oasis Recovery Center, we believe your story matters—and so does your path to healing. No two journeys are the same, which is why we create a personalized treatment plan tailored to your specific needs and goals. Whether you’re just beginning with medical detox or transitioning into outpatient care, our team is here to guide you with compassion, clarity, and unwavering support. You don’t have to walk this road alone. Let us help you take the next step toward a life of freedom, purpose, and lasting recovery. Contact us to learn more about our Fort Myers addiction ​treatment programs. 

 
 
 

Medically reviewed By: Jennifer Barletta- Licensed Mental Health Counselor- Qualified Supervisor (LMHC- QS)

 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Healing doesn’t happen by chance—it happens with a plan and the right support system. At Oasis Recovery Center, we walk alongside you with proven therapies, a compassionate team, and a structured approach designed to help you reclaim your life. Whether you're overcoming addiction, navigating mental health challenges, or both, we’re here to equip you with the tools, confidence, and care you need to move forward. Your future is worth fighting for, and we’re honored to be part of your journey. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Medical Detoxification

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

When addiction takes hold, the body often becomes physically dependent on drugs or alcohol. Medical detox i s the first step toward freedom—providing a safe, supervised environment where you can begin to heal. With expert support, we help you manage withdrawal symptoms and prepare your body and mind for the next stage of recovery.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Begin Your Detox Journey 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Residential Treatment

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

When everyday life is filled with triggers and stress, it can be hard to truly heal. Our residential treatment program gives you the space to step away and focus fully on recovery. In a structured and caring environment, you’ll explore the root causes of addiction through individual and group therapy, build emotional resilience, and begin creating a healthier future.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Explore Residential Care 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Partial Hospitalization (PHP)

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Our Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP) is designed for those who need consistent, intensive care but are ready to begin transitioning back into daily life. With a full schedule of therapy, skill-building, and medical support during the day—and the ability to return home in the evening—PHP gives you the stability you need to stay on track while building confidence and independence in your recovery journey.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 See How PHP Works 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Intensive Outpatient (IOP)

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Our Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP) is designed to support your recovery while you continue living your life. Whether you're working, going to school, or caring for family, IOP gives you access to therapy, support groups, and skill-building sessions—without stepping away from your responsibilities. You’ll gain the tools to manage triggers and maintain progress, all while staying rooted in your daily routine.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Learn About IOP 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Dual Diagnosis

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

When addiction and mental health challenges go hand in hand, treating only one is not enough. Our Dual Diagnosis program is built to address both at the same time, helping you understand how they’re connected and giving you the support needed to heal completely. With integrated care and a personalized approach, you’ll gain clarity, stability, and the tools to move forward with strength.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Explore Dual Diagnosis Care 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Insurances we accept

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Need Immediate Help?

 
 
 

Our Oasis Recovery specialists are here for you 24/7. 

Reach out to them now and start your path to recovery without delay.

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Here's How We Can Help 

 
 
 

Take the First Step Toward Healing

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Detoxification 

 
 
 

 Start your recovery with a clean slate. 

Before healing can begin, your body needs to safely release harmful substances. Our medically supervised detox program helps you take that first critical step, managing withdrawal symptoms in a safe, supportive environment. This allows you to move forward with clarity and strength.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Behavioral Therapy 

 
 
 

 Rewire the mind and rebuild the future. 

Addiction is not just physical. It deeply affects your thoughts, habits, and emotions. Our expert-led behavioral therapies, including CBT, mindfulness, group therapy, and family therapy, help you understand the reasons behind your behavior and give you tools to break free for good.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Pharmacotherapy 

 
 
 

 Support your recovery with evidence based care. 

When appropriate, we use medications that reduce cravings and ease withdrawal symptoms. This clinical approach is combined with compassionate care, helping your body and mind work together toward lasting freedom.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Support Programs 

 
 
 

 You do not have to do this alone. 

Healing is easier when you feel seen, heard, and supported. We connect you with support groups, counseling, and educational programs. These resources help you build lasting connections and remind you that hope is real and recovery is possible.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Occupational Therapy 

 
 
 

 Rediscover joy and purpose through creativity. 

Addiction often robs people of identity and passion. Through music, art, movement, and skill building activities, our occupational therapy program helps you reconnect with yourself, reduce stress, and develop healthy coping tools for daily life.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Rehabilitation Programs 

 
 
 

 Get ready for life beyond treatment. 

True recovery goes beyond breaking addiction. It is about thriving in everyday life. Our rehabilitation programs focus on helping you reintegrate into society with confidence, structure, and a clear plan for long term success.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Our Process: A Clear Path to Healing 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 Get the Support You Deserve 

 
 
 

You don’t have to face this alone. At Oasis Recovery Center, you’ll be welcomed into a safe and understanding environment where experienced professionals walk alongside you every step of the way. This is your first step toward lasting change.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 Discover the Root of the Struggle 

 
 
 

Addiction is often a symptom of something deeper. With the help of trusted counselors and healthcare professionals, we’ll work with you to uncover and address the underlying issues driving your addiction. Healing starts with understanding.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 Follow a Plan Designed for You 

 
 
 

No two recovery journeys are the same. That’s why we create a treatment plan tailored specifically to your needs, challenges, and goals. Our team will guide you through a customized program built to help you reclaim your life with strength and clarity.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Ready to get started? 

 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 TESTIMONIALS 

 
 
 

 Healing Happens Here 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 "The staff truly cares" 

 
 
 

"From the moment I walked in, I felt supported. The team at Oasis helped me believe in myself again and gave me the tools to rebuild my life."

 - Jessica R. 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 "A safe place to heal" 

 
 
 

"I had tried other programs before, but nothing felt as personal or effective. Oasis gave me a sense of peace I hadn’t felt in years."

 - David M. 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 "Exactly what I needed" 

 
 
 

"I was broken and hopeless. This place brought light back into my life. I’m forever grateful for the love and guidance I received."

 - Rachel T. 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 BREAK FREE 

 
 
 

 reclaim your life 

 
 
 

 Addiction doesn’t define you. You deserve a chance to heal, to overcome, and to build a brighter future, 

 and you don’t have to do it alone. 

 At Oasis Recovery, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

3625 Hidden Tree Ln

Fort Myers, FL 33901

Main Phone: (844) 467-4450 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

© 2026 Oasis Recovery. All rights reserved. Site designed and managed by Mosheli. 

 Privacy Policy | Terms and Conditions 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 Get Help Today

/* Header Section (Initial State) */
#section-m86nCanHqq {
    background-color: transparent;
    padding: 20px 0;
    transition: background-color 0.6s ease, padding 0.5s ease;
}

/* Header Section (Scrolled State) */
#section-m86nCanHqq.scrolled {
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) !important;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    padding: 5px 0 !important;
}

/* Logo/Image Scaling */
#image-IRUEzqZ-yQ {
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
}

#image-IRUEzqZ-yQ.scrolled {
    transform: scale(0.5);
    padding: 1px 0 !important;
}

/* Social Icons Color */
#social-icons-kE-lg1-vNB i {
    color: #57CE7F !important;
}

#section-3zFbngBPw7 {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
}

#section-3zFbngBPw7::before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    background-image: url('your-image-url.jpg');
 /* replace with your image */
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    opacity: 0.1;
    z-index: -1;
    pointer-events: none;
}

#image-mRBLao6EcL {
    display: block;
    max-width: 100%;
    width: 100%;

    right: 20px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #57ce7f 0%, #3fb86a 100%);
    color: white;
    border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 15px 25px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;

    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);

    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 16px;
  }

  .floating-call-button:hover {
    transform: scale(1.05);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    color: white;
  }

  .floating-call-button svg {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;

    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));

    text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);

    }
    50% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 10px rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
    100% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
  }

    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 12px 20px;
      font-size: 14px;
      gap: 10px;
      bottom: 15px;
      right: 15px;

    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 10px 16px;
      font-size: 13px;
      gap: 8px;
    }

      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
    }
  }
</style>

pages.rawText:
Oasis Recovery's Fort Myers Rehab 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

About 

 
 
Overview
 
 

 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 YOU ARE NOT ALONE 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 BREAK FREE 

 
 
 

 reclaim your life 

 
 
 

 Addiction doesn’t define you. You deserve a chance to heal, to overcome, and to build a brighter future, 

 and you don’t have to do it alone. 

 At Oasis Recovery's Fort Myer rehab, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 We Know What You’re Facing 

 
 
 

 Addiction affects every part of your life. It damages relationships, impacts your health, and steals moments you can never get back. 

 At Oasis Recovery, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Need Immediate Help?

 
 
 

Our Oasis Recovery specialists are here for you 24/7. 

Reach out to them now and start your path to recovery without delay.

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

We’re Here for You 

 
 
 

 At Oasis Recovery, we’ve helped countless people find their way out of addiction. Our team of dedicated specialists provides a safe, supportive, and judgment‑free space where you can focus on recovery and renewal. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

get started today

 
 
 

 A Simple Path to Recovery 

 
 
 

 

 Step 1: Call us or fill out a quick form.

 Step 2: Begin a personalized treatment plan tailored to your needs.

 Step 3 : Build a life of long‑term sobriety, health, and fulfillment.

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Rediscover Life and Freedom 

 
 
 

 With holistic, evidence‑based care, you can break free from addiction and create a future you’re proud of, 

 one that’s filled with purpose, connection, and joy. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

3625 Hidden Tree Ln

Fort Myers, FL 33901

Main Phone: (844) 467-4450 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

© 2026 Oasis Recovery. All rights reserved. Site designed and managed by Mosheli. 

 Privacy Policy | Terms and Conditions 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 Get Help Today

    border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 15px 25px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    text-decoration: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 16px;
  }

  .floating-call-button:hover {
    transform: scale(1.05);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    color: white;
  }

  .floating-call-button svg {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
  }

  .floating-call-button-text {
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0.7);
    }
    50% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 10px rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
    100% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 12px 20px;
      font-size: 14px;
      gap: 10px;
      bottom: 15px;
      right: 15px;
    }
    
    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 10px 16px;
      font-size: 13px;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    
    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
    }
  }
</style>

pages.rawText:
Fort Myers Addiction Treatment: Oasis Recovery Programs 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

(844) 467-4450

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Fort Myers Addiction ​Treatment Programs 

 
 
 

 At Oasis Recovery Center, we believe your story matters—and so does your path to healing. No two journeys are the same, which is why we create a personalized treatment plan tailored to your specific needs and goals. Whether you’re just beginning with medical detox or transitioning into outpatient care, our team is here to guide you with compassion, clarity, and unwavering support. You don’t have to walk this road alone. Let us help you take the next step toward a life of freedom, purpose, and lasting recovery. Contact us to learn more about our Fort Myers addiction ​treatment programs. 

 
 
 

Medically reviewed By: Jennifer Barletta- Licensed Mental Health Counselor- Qualified Supervisor (LMHC- QS)

 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Healing doesn’t happen by chance—it happens with a plan and the right support system. At Oasis Recovery Center, we walk alongside you with proven therapies, a compassionate team, and a structured approach designed to help you reclaim your life. Whether you're overcoming addiction, navigating mental health challenges, or both, we’re here to equip you with the tools, confidence, and care you need to move forward. Your future is worth fighting for, and we’re honored to be part of your journey. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Medical Detoxification

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

When addiction takes hold, the body often becomes physically dependent on drugs or alcohol. Medical detox i s the first step toward freedom—providing a safe, supervised environment where you can begin to heal. With expert support, we help you manage withdrawal symptoms and prepare your body and mind for the next stage of recovery.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Begin Your Detox Journey 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Residential Treatment

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

When everyday life is filled with triggers and stress, it can be hard to truly heal. Our residential treatment program gives you the space to step away and focus fully on recovery. In a structured and caring environment, you’ll explore the root causes of addiction through individual and group therapy, build emotional resilience, and begin creating a healthier future.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Explore Residential Care 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Partial Hospitalization (PHP)

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Our Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP) is designed for those who need consistent, intensive care but are ready to begin transitioning back into daily life. With a full schedule of therapy, skill-building, and medical support during the day—and the ability to return home in the evening—PHP gives you the stability you need to stay on track while building confidence and independence in your recovery journey.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 See How PHP Works 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Intensive Outpatient (IOP)

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Our Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP) is designed to support your recovery while you continue living your life. Whether you're working, going to school, or caring for family, IOP gives you access to therapy, support groups, and skill-building sessions—without stepping away from your responsibilities. You’ll gain the tools to manage triggers and maintain progress, all while staying rooted in your daily routine.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Learn About IOP 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Dual Diagnosis

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

When addiction and mental health challenges go hand in hand, treating only one is not enough. Our Dual Diagnosis program is built to address both at the same time, helping you understand how they’re connected and giving you the support needed to heal completely. With integrated care and a personalized approach, you’ll gain clarity, stability, and the tools to move forward with strength.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Explore Dual Diagnosis Care 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Insurances we accept

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Need Immediate Help?

 
 
 

Our Oasis Recovery specialists are here for you 24/7. 

Reach out to them now and start your path to recovery without delay.

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Here's How We Can Help 

 
 
 

Take the First Step Toward Healing

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Detoxification 

 
 
 

 Start your recovery with a clean slate. 

Before healing can begin, your body needs to safely release harmful substances. Our medically supervised detox program helps you take that first critical step, managing withdrawal symptoms in a safe, supportive environment. This allows you to move forward with clarity and strength.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Behavioral Therapy 

 
 
 

 Rewire the mind and rebuild the future. 

Addiction is not just physical. It deeply affects your thoughts, habits, and emotions. Our expert-led behavioral therapies, including CBT, mindfulness, group therapy, and family therapy, help you understand the reasons behind your behavior and give you tools to break free for good.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Pharmacotherapy 

 
 
 

 Support your recovery with evidence based care. 

When appropriate, we use medications that reduce cravings and ease withdrawal symptoms. This clinical approach is combined with compassionate care, helping your body and mind work together toward lasting freedom.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Support Programs 

 
 
 

 You do not have to do this alone. 

Healing is easier when you feel seen, heard, and supported. We connect you with support groups, counseling, and educational programs. These resources help you build lasting connections and remind you that hope is real and recovery is possible.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Occupational Therapy 

 
 
 

 Rediscover joy and purpose through creativity. 

Addiction often robs people of identity and passion. Through music, art, movement, and skill building activities, our occupational therapy program helps you reconnect with yourself, reduce stress, and develop healthy coping tools for daily life.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 Rehabilitation Programs 

 
 
 

 Get ready for life beyond treatment. 

True recovery goes beyond breaking addiction. It is about thriving in everyday life. Our rehabilitation programs focus on helping you reintegrate into society with confidence, structure, and a clear plan for long term success.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Our Process: A Clear Path to Healing 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 Get the Support You Deserve 

 
 
 

You don’t have to face this alone. At Oasis Recovery Center, you’ll be welcomed into a safe and understanding environment where experienced professionals walk alongside you every step of the way. This is your first step toward lasting change.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 Discover the Root of the Struggle 

 
 
 

Addiction is often a symptom of something deeper. With the help of trusted counselors and healthcare professionals, we’ll work with you to uncover and address the underlying issues driving your addiction. Healing starts with understanding.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 Follow a Plan Designed for You 

 
 
 

No two recovery journeys are the same. That’s why we create a treatment plan tailored specifically to your needs, challenges, and goals. Our team will guide you through a customized program built to help you reclaim your life with strength and clarity.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Ready to get started? 

 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 TESTIMONIALS 

 
 
 

 Healing Happens Here 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 "The staff truly cares" 

 
 
 

"From the moment I walked in, I felt supported. The team at Oasis helped me believe in myself again and gave me the tools to rebuild my life."

 - Jessica R. 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 "A safe place to heal" 

 
 
 

"I had tried other programs before, but nothing felt as personal or effective. Oasis gave me a sense of peace I hadn’t felt in years."

 - David M. 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 "Exactly what I needed" 

 
 
 

"I was broken and hopeless. This place brought light back into my life. I’m forever grateful for the love and guidance I received."

 - Rachel T. 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 BREAK FREE 

 
 
 

 reclaim your life 

 
 
 

 Addiction doesn’t define you. You deserve a chance to heal, to overcome, and to build a brighter future, 

 and you don’t have to do it alone. 

 At Oasis Recovery, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

3625 Hidden Tree Ln

Fort Myers, FL 33901

Main Phone: (844) 467-4450 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

© 2026 Oasis Recovery. All rights reserved. Site designed and managed by Mosheli. 

 Privacy Policy | Terms and Conditions 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 Get Help Today

    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) !important;

}

  #jc-badge {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    z-index: 9999;
  }

  .floating-call-button {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #57ce7f 0%, #3fb86a 100%);
    color: white;
    border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 15px 25px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    text-decoration: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 16px;
  }

  .floating-call-button:hover {
    transform: scale(1.05);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    color: white;
  }

  .floating-call-button svg {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
  }

  .floating-call-button-text {
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0.7);
    }
    50% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 10px rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
    100% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 12px 20px;
      font-size: 14px;
      gap: 10px;
      bottom: 15px;
      right: 15px;
    }
    
    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 10px 16px;
      font-size: 13px;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    
    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
    }
  }
</style>

Oasis Recovery's Fort Myers Rehab 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

About 

 
 
Overview
 
 

 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 YOU ARE NOT ALONE 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 BREAK FREE 

 
 
 

 reclaim your life 

 
 
 

 Addiction doesn’t define you. You deserve a chance to heal, to overcome, and to build a brighter future, 

 and you don’t have to do it alone. 

 At Oasis Recovery's Fort Myer rehab, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 We Know What You’re Facing 

 
 
 

 Addiction affects every part of your life. It damages relationships, impacts your health, and steals moments you can never get back. 

 At Oasis Recovery, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Need Immediate Help?

 
 
 

Our Oasis Recovery specialists are here for you 24/7. 

Reach out to them now and start your path to recovery without delay.

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

We’re Here for You 

 
 
 

 At Oasis Recovery, we’ve helped countless people find their way out of addiction. Our team of dedicated specialists provides a safe, supportive, and judgment‑free space where you can focus on recovery and renewal. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

get started today

 
 
 

 A Simple Path to Recovery 

 
 
 

 

 Step 1: Call us or fill out a quick form.

 Step 2: Begin a personalized treatment plan tailored to your needs.

 Step 3 : Build a life of long‑term sobriety, health, and fulfillment.

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Rediscover Life and Freedom 

 
 
 

 With holistic, evidence‑based care, you can break free from addiction and create a future you’re proud of, 

 one that’s filled with purpose, connection, and joy. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

3625 Hidden Tree Ln

Fort Myers, FL 33901

Main Phone: (844) 467-4450

 Privacy Policy | Terms and Conditions 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 Get Help Today

pages.rawText:
Oasis Recovery's Fort Myers Rehab 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

About 

 
 
Overview
 
 

 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 YOU ARE NOT ALONE 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 BREAK FREE 

 
 
 

 reclaim your life 

 
 
 

 Addiction doesn’t define you. You deserve a chance to heal, to overcome, and to build a brighter future, 

 and you don’t have to do it alone. 

 At Oasis Recovery's Fort Myer rehab, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 We Know What You’re Facing 

 
 
 

 Addiction affects every part of your life. It damages relationships, impacts your health, and steals moments you can never get back. 

 At Oasis Recovery, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Need Immediate Help?

 
 
 

Our Oasis Recovery specialists are here for you 24/7. 

Reach out to them now and start your path to recovery without delay.

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

We’re Here for You 

 
 
 

 At Oasis Recovery, we’ve helped countless people find their way out of addiction. Our team of dedicated specialists provides a safe, supportive, and judgment‑free space where you can focus on recovery and renewal. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

get started today

 
 
 

 A Simple Path to Recovery 

 
 
 

 

 Step 1: Call us or fill out a quick form.

 Step 2: Begin a personalized treatment plan tailored to your needs.

 Step 3 : Build a life of long‑term sobriety, health, and fulfillment.

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Rediscover Life and Freedom 

 
 
 

 With holistic, evidence‑based care, you can break free from addiction and create a future you’re proud of, 

 one that’s filled with purpose, connection, and joy. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

3625 Hidden Tree Ln

Fort Myers, FL 33901

Main Phone: (844) 467-4450 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

© 2026 Oasis Recovery. All rights reserved. Site designed and managed by Mosheli. 

 Privacy Policy | Terms and Conditions 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 Get Help Today

/* Header Section (Initial State) */
#section-m86nCanHqq {
    background-color: transparent;
    padding: 20px 0;
    transition: background-color 0.6s ease, padding 0.5s ease;
}

/* Header Section (Scrolled State) */
#section-m86nCanHqq.scrolled {
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) !important;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    padding: 5px 0 !important;
}

/* Logo/Image Scaling */
#image-IRUEzqZ-yQ {
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
}

#image-IRUEzqZ-yQ.scrolled {
    transform: scale(0.5);
    padding: 1px 0 !important;
}

/* Social Icons Color */
#social-icons-kE-lg1-vNB i {
    color: #57CE7F !important;
}

#section-3zFbngBPw7 {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
}

#section-3zFbngBPw7::before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    background-image: url('your-image-url.jpg');
 /* replace with your image */
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    opacity: 0.1;
    z-index: -1;
    pointer-events: none;
}

#image-mRBLao6EcL {
    display: block;
    max-width: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
}

  #jc-badge {

    position: fixed;
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #57ce7f 0%, #3fb86a 100%);
    color: white;
    border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 15px 25px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    text-decoration: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 16px;
  }

  .floating-call-button:hover {
    transform: scale(1.05);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    color: white;
  }

  .floating-call-button svg {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
  }

  .floating-call-button-text {
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0.7);
    }
    50% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 10px rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
    100% {
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 0 rgba(87, 206, 127, 0);
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 12px 20px;
      font-size: 14px;
      gap: 10px;
      bottom: 15px;
      right: 15px;
    }
    
    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .floating-call-button {
      padding: 10px 16px;
      font-size: 13px;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    
    .floating-call-button svg {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
    }
  }
</style>

pages.rawText:
Oasis Recovery's Fort Myers Rehab 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

About 

 
 
Overview
 
 

 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 YOU ARE NOT ALONE 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
Home 
 

 
About Us 
 

 
Treatments 
 

 
 
Medical Detoxification
 

 
Residential Treatment
 

 
Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
 

 
Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment
 
 

 

 
Admissions 
 

 
Addiction Resources 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 BREAK FREE 

 
 
 

 reclaim your life 

 
 
 

 Addiction doesn’t define you. You deserve a chance to heal, to overcome, and to build a brighter future, 

 and you don’t have to do it alone. 

 At Oasis Recovery's Fort Myer rehab, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 We Know What You’re Facing 

 
 
 

 Addiction affects every part of your life. It damages relationships, impacts your health, and steals moments you can never get back. 

 At Oasis Recovery, we understand this struggle and the pain it brings. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Need Immediate Help?

 
 
 

Our Oasis Recovery specialists are here for you 24/7. 

Reach out to them now and start your path to recovery without delay.

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Call (844) 467-4450 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

We’re Here for You 

 
 
 

 At Oasis Recovery, we’ve helped countless people find their way out of addiction. Our team of dedicated specialists provides a safe, supportive, and judgment‑free space where you can focus on recovery and renewal. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

get started today

 
 
 

 A Simple Path to Recovery 

 
 
 

 

 Step 1: Call us or fill out a quick form.

 Step 2: Begin a personalized treatment plan tailored to your needs.

 Step 3 : Build a life of long‑term sobriety, health, and fulfillment.

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Rediscover Life and Freedom 

 
 
 

 With holistic, evidence‑based care, you can break free from addiction and create a future you’re proud of, 

 one that’s filled with purpose, connection, and joy. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

3625 Hidden Tree Ln

Fort Myers, FL 33901

Main Phone: (844) 467-4450 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

© 2026 Oasis Recovery. All rights reserved. Site designed and managed by Mosheli. 

 Privacy Policy | Terms and Conditions 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 Get Help Today

Medical detox i s the first step toward freedom—providing a safe, supervised environment where you can begin to heal.
Begin Your Detox Journey
Our medically supervised detox program helps you take that first critical step, managing withdrawal symptoms in a safe, supportive environment.

rawMentions: Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
Our Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP) is designed for those who need consistent, intensive care but are ready to begin transitioning back into daily life.

With a full schedule of therapy, skill-building, and medical support during the day—and the ability to return home in the evening—PHP gives you the stability you need to stay on track while building confidence and independence in your recovery journey.
See How PHP Works

rawMentions: Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
Our Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP) is designed to support your recovery while you continue living your life.
Whether you're working, going to school, or caring for family, IOP gives you access to therapy, support groups, and skill-building sessions—without stepping away from your responsibilities.
Learn About IOP
